name: Crescent Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
MEAT FILLING: In a large skillet, brown the ground beef and drain. Add all meat filling ingredients. Simmer, uncovered, for 5 minutes. The meat mixture can be made ahead and refrigerated.
CHEESE FILLING: Combine creamed cottage cheese, egg, and Parmesan cheese.
CRUST: Separate crescent dough into 8 rectangles. Place the dough rectangles together on an ungreased cookie sheet, overlapping edges slightly to form a rectangle about 15x13 inches. Press the perforations and edges to seal well.
Spread half of the meat filling lengthwise down the center of the dough, stopping 1 inch from each end. Top with cheese filling; spoon remaining meat filling over top, forming three layers. Place cheese slices over the meat filling.
Fold the ends of the dough rectangle over the filling, about 1 inch. Pull the long sides of the dough over the filling, overlapping edges only a quarter inch. Pinch the overlapped edges to seal. Brush with milk and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. If preparing ahead, cover and refrigerate for 2-3 hours before baking. Increase baking time to 25-30 minutes.
